How Glanbia shares have been performing
Glanbia (ISE:GL9) has drawn investor attention after recent share price moves, with the stock showing a 0.3% gain over the past day and a 3.3% rise over the past week.
Over the past month, the shares show a 1.2% decline, while the past 3 months reflect a 16.9% return. Year to date, the stock has returned 20.2%, and the 1 year total return stands at 82.8%.
Looking further back, Glanbia reports 3 year and 5 year total returns of 38.4% and 54.8%...

business.title: Why APA (APA) Is Down 8.1% After Oil Slides On US-Iran Ceasefire And Strait Reopening
business.description:
In recent days, APA Corporation has been hit by a sharp pullback in crude oil prices after a US–Iran ceasefire agreement led to the conditional reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, even as the company confirmed a US$0.25 per share dividend payable on May 22, 2026 to holders on April 22, 2026.
This combination of easing geopolitical tension, shifting oil supply expectations, and fresh analyst earnings revisions is forcing investors to reassess how sensitive APA’s cash flows are to sudden...

science.title: Are Neutrinos Their Own Evil Twins? Part 1: So We're Going to Redefine "Particle"
science.description: A brilliant physicist vanished in 1938, leaving behind one strange, quiet paper. It described something that shouldn't exist: a particle that is its own antiparticle. To understand why that matters, we first need to rethink what a particle even is — and that means getting weird with chirality, the Higgs field, and the neutrino's stubborn refusal to follow the rules.
